params.name: Gold-plated Bird
params.description: Crafted from alloy and coated with gold, the Gold-plated Bird statue is a remarkable piece of craftsmanship. It was produced alongside the Golden Bird statue made of real gold, faithfully replicating its appearance on a one-to-one scale. While it may lack some commemorative value, it still stands as an outstanding work of art!
